description: Hand-computed Layer-2 fixture. Toy linear detector proba = bias + sum_f w_f * x_f. Instance all-ones; SimpleBackgroundErasure sets erased features to 0. p_full = 0.3 + 0.2 + 0.1 + 0.05 = 0.65. k=1 -> top feature by |attr| is A. comprehensiveness = p_full - p(erase A) = 0.65 - 0.45 = 0.20. sufficiency = p_full - p(keep only A) = 0.65 - 0.50 = 0.15.
